title: Modify diff and inspect docs
body:
Format the examples in podman-diff.md better.
The description for --type in the inspect docs was slightly different
from that in the inline help.
Also stated what values to use in the Go template for the --format flag.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: nit, if you can change "calues" to "values" in the PR description.

> nit, if you can change "calues" to "values" in the PR description.

Fixed
@mheon can you trigger the FAH27 test again - looks like it timed out.
Fedora test failures are known racy tests.
